description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and test that runs on workflow dispatch, push to main, and pull requests to main. The workflow uses a concurrency group with a fallback value and cancels in-progress jobs. It defines a matrix job ci that runs on multiple operating systems (macos-14, ubuntu-latest, windows-latest) and languages (cpp, swift, python, php, ruby, csharp, java, js, matlab), with custom make and test flags for certain configurations. The job checks out the repository, sets up dependencies, builds, and tests the code with a 90-minute timeout for each step.
